entities.name: LOCAL NORMATIVE CLIMATE
entities.description: A concept used to understand community-level social processes that shape individuals' sense of agency and decision-making capacities.

entities.name: AGENCY
entities.description: The sense of capacity for taking important decisions, particularly within the context of agricultural livelihoods.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of living derived from agricultural activities.

entities.name: COMMUNITY-LEVEL SOCIAL PROCESSES
entities.description: Social dynamics that shape individuals' sense of agency and decision-making capacities.

entities.name: GENDER NORMS
entities.description: Contextual, fluid, and relational properties that inform the concept of local normative climate.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE EXAMINATION
entities.description: A research approach used to analyze assessments of decision-making capacity across village case studies.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where the research and village case studies were conducted.

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of men and women to make important decisions in their lives and livelihoods.

entities.name: LOCAL INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Local organizational structures that influence the evolution of normative expectations and agency.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: External factors or possibilities in agriculture that can be perceived as empowering depending on the normative climate.
